response.overview: Bound by a marriage ordained by royal edict, cold commander Xiao Wu Yi and the cunning daughter of the Grand Tutor, Xie Jia Yu, are brought together not for love but to serve hidden agendas. From a contractual couple to lifelong partners, from suspicion and conflict to love and unity, they go from rivals in ambition to comrades in life.
response.title: 雀骨
